name: Ladle (Fast React Component Dev Environment)

performance.notes: Vite-powered; 10x faster than Storybook for cold starts

agent_readiness.notes: Storybook alternative built on Vite for fast React component development. npm i @ladle/react. Create *.stories.tsx files: export const Primary = () => <Button variant='primary'>Click</Button>. npx ladle serve (dev) / npx ladle build (static). Story args: export const WithArgs = (args: {label: string}) => <Button>{args.label}</Button>; WithArgs.args = {label: 'Click me'}. Controls: automatic from args types. Meta: export default { title: 'Components/Button' }. addDecorator for global wrappers. Storybook-compatible CSF (Component Story Format) — many Storybook stories work without changes. TypeScript-first. Provider for context/theme. Smaller addon ecosystem than Storybook.

gotchas: Smaller ecosystem than Storybook — fewer addons
React-only (unlike Storybook which supports Vue, Angular, Svelte, etc.)
Less enterprise adoption — fewer integrations with design tools
Some Storybook-specific features (chromatic visual testing) not directly available
best_when: React-only component libraries wanting fast Vite-powered development
When Storybook's startup time is a pain point
Small/medium teams not needing full Storybook addon ecosystem
Migrating from Storybook wanting CSF compatibility
avoid_when: Multi-framework projects (Vue, Angular, Svelte) — use Storybook
When visual regression testing via Chromatic is required
Enterprise teams needing full design system tooling
summary: Ladle is a fast Vite-powered Storybook alternative for React. *.stories.tsx with CSF format. npx ladle serve. 10x faster startup than Storybook. TypeScript-first. Storybook-compatible story format. MIT by Vojtech Masek. React-only. Smaller addon ecosystem. Best for React teams frustrated with Storybook's slow startup. Use Storybook for multi-framework, design tool integration, or Chromatic visual testing.
